body.value: The machine reads the page aloud, letter for letter. Under the cipher reading you are hearing enciphered speech; under the grille reading you are hearing the rhythm a table-and-overlay produces; under the abjad reading you are hearing a real language you simply don't know. Same sound, three claims. [the page it reads aloud](archie:voynich/) (03 §4 cross-link AV→image f18v; `archie:` ref resolves to the voynich exhibit. A note-precise `archie:voynich/#/a/<logicalId>` target awaits a stable R2 note id — human/Studio follow-up.)
